Her younger sister became Queen of the K: Her younger sister became Queen of the Kingdom of Time, and her youngest sister became the Queen of the Kingdom of Space.
Together they governed the universe and: Together they governed the universe and kept it in place.
All was well between them, and life was: All was well between them, and life was in total order.

Griselda's daughter brought up a golden: Griselda's daughter brought up a golden chalice. A gift from Griselda's two sisters.
Ordained with the finest jewels and ston: Ordained with the finest jewels and stones found from around the world...

\\ts[1]\"You've gone too far, mother. We: \ts[1]"You've gone too far, mother. We did what needed to be done."

Griselda, the Queen everyone thought to: Griselda, the Queen everyone thought to have perished, rose again.
Her body warped in shapes too disturbing: Her body warped in shapes too disturbing for any eye to witness.

Griselda's rampage had only just begun.
With her newfound powers, she tore throu: With her newfound powers, she tore through the one thing she thought she could trust. Her people.

And as for her beloved daughter, the one: And as for her beloved daughter, the one who conspired with Griselda's own sisters to murder her...
She tore out her soul and locked it away: She tore out her soul and locked it away.
